Your first 2 submissions qualify for .125 rebated on fees. We are aggressive with our new broker partners and willing to match or beat any competitors legitimate offer. I simply need a screen shot of the pricing to make a concession request.

· Pricing and Rate Sheets: The pricing calculator and rate sheets are found after log-in. Under "Tools" in the navigation bar, select Tools and Resources from the drop down and then click on the Rate Sheets tile. I am happy to help with pricing scenarios.
· Quick Reference Guide: This has it all, contacts, key addresses, IDs and more. https://www.gopennymac.com/assets/documents/non-delegated-resources/non-del-quick-reference-guide.pdf
· Training: We have a multi-lender training tomorrow June 2. I will add you all to the invitation and then feel free to send me the names and email of anyone else you think should attend.
· Overlays: I linked the overlay fact sheet to this email here: https://www.gopennymac.com/assets/documents/non-delegated-resources/non-delegated-agency-overlay-matrix.pdf

· Lock/Register: If anyone is ready to register/lock a loan, I also linked to the step-by-step guides for how to do so below. For a user to lock in the PennyMac system, they must have the "Seller Lock Desk" user role.

Welcome to PennyMac! As you know, PennyMac recently established an investor relationship with Groves Capital. As your sales rep, I look forward to developing a long lasting business relationship with Groves Capital and you. PennyMac offers lender autonomy, great pricing and a consistent experience. With PennyMac you have access to:
o Initial approval in 1 day or less for purchase loans and 2-3 days for refinances.
o Conditions in 1 day for purchase loans and 2-3 days for refinances.

2. Dedicated support: You have a Pipeline Account Manager (PAM) assigned to monitor your pipeline and work with you as needed to check loan status, address questions and help you get to CTC quickly. This is your main point of contact.

3. Very few overlays: PennyMac is focused on efficiency and aligns with a majority of Fannie/Freddie guidelines, so we have very few overlays. Check out our product matrices for details: https://www.gopennymac.com/products
4. An experienced team: PennyMac is a top Correspondent investor and number one non-bank investor, led by a seasoned management team.
5. Simplified servicing: PennyMac services all of the loans we purchase, so your customer will not be transferred multiple times before finding a home to service their mortgage.
